Agile promotes iterative development, allowing teams to deliver working software faster and with higher quality. This leads to better time-to-market, as features are developed and tested in cycles. <<actor>> collaboration is enhanced through daily stand-ups and cross-functional teams, ensuring everyone is aligned and working towards common goals. <<bottom>> customer satisfaction is improved as feedback is incorporated quickly, leading to more responsive products. <<pack>> data-driven decisions are made based on real-time metrics, optimizing resource allocation.  

Paragraph 2

This flexibility helps startups navigate uncertainty and stay competitive. <<actor>> The focus on collaboration ensures that all stakeholders are involved in the development process, reducing misunderstandings and improving outcomes. <<bottom>> Studies show that companies using Agile often report higher customer satisfaction rates, as products are more aligned with user needs. <<pack>> The emphasis on efficiency means that resources are used optimally, reducing waste and increasing profitability.  

Paragraph 3  
<<vegetable>> By prioritizing customer satisfaction, Agile methodologies ensure that the product meets market demands. Paragraph 4

Paragraph 5
